Collection and Use of InformationLINE Antivirus collects information on installed applications such as application names, package names, hashes, signatures, versions.It also collects information on your device, such as carrier, country/region, model name, and Android OS details. This information is only used to analyze, diagnose, and remove malicious code and is never. All
information collected will be encrypted and transmitted to the LINE antivirus log collection server. All collected
information is only used improve the LINE Antivirus service and its features.URLs of websites you visit are collected to check for and provide notifications about dangerous websites.
